task_completion.description: Verify that the Sygic GPS Navigation application is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic GPS Navigation app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigates to the menu or section where the 'Home' location can be configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A menu, settings screen, or favorites list showing the 'Home' location option is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent searches for the Eiffel Tower.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar within the Sygic app contains the text 'Eiffel Tower' or its address components.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct address for the Eiffel Tower is selected from the search results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The selected location details or search result displays 'Eiffel Tower' along with address keywords such as 'Champ de Mars', 'Anatole France', 'Paris', or '75007'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Home' location is successfully set to the Eiffel Tower.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Home' label in the app's saved places, favorites, or dashboard now displays 'Eiffel Tower' or its corresponding address.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual Sygic app GUI, not a web browser searching for the Eiffel Tower or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the GUI to configure the location.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows, command-line interfaces, or scripts visible being used to bypass the app's UI.

integrity.description: Verify that the location search and selection occurred naturally within the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The search results and location pins appear natively within the Sygic map and search interface, rather than being copy-pasted text outside the app's standard input fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target location is 'Eiffel Tower'. The correct address must include the keywords: 'Champ de Mars', 'Anatole France', 'Paris', and '75007'. The specific app feature to be configured is labeled 'Home'.
